welcome.title: Nau mai ki LIpsum Writer
welcome.description: He tirohanga tere ki ngā wāhi me te mata kāinga.

intro.title: Nau mai
intro.body: Ko LIpsum Writer he wāhi mahi tuhituhi i hangaia mō ngā wāhi — kotahi te wāhi ki ia kaupapa, tuhinga, pukapuka rānei. Me tirotiro tere tātou.

continue.title: Haere tonu mai i te wāhi i mutu ai koe
continue.body: Kei konei tō wāhi tata nei e whakatikatikahia ana. Pātuhi kotahi, ka tuwhera anō.

startSpace.title: Tīmata he mea hou
startSpace.body: Waihangahia he wāhi hou mai i te tauira — tuhinga roa, pukapuka, tuhinga rerekē — ka tīmata te tuhituhi i roto i ngā hēkona.

writer.title: Te wāhi mahi a te kaituhi
writer.description: He haerenga i te ētita, te pae taha me te pae runga.

intro.title: Te mata tuhituhi
intro.body: Ko konei te wāhi e mahi ai koe. Me titiro tātou ki ngā waka, ngā aratau me ngā taputapu ka nui te whakamahi e koe.

spaceTitle.title: Taitara wāhi
spaceTitle.body: Pātuhia te taitara hei whakaingoa anō i te wāhi. Ka tuwhera te tohu i te taha ki ōna tautuhinga.

sections.title: Ngā wāhanga me ngā tuhinga
sections.body: Whakaritea he wāhi ki ngā wāhanga, me ngā wāhanga ki ngā tuhinga. Tāhia tētahi wāhanga hei tāpiri tuhinga.

settings.title: Tautuhinga wāhi
settings.body: Whakahaerehia te tauira, ngā wāhanga, te tiri me te whakakore i tēnei wāhi.

modes.title: Pānui · Tuhi · Wehe
modes.body: Hurihia i waenga i te whakatika, te pānui rānei i te tirohanga taha-tahi. Ka mau ki ia tuhinga tana aratau whakamutunga.

citations.title: Ngā tohutoro
citations.body: Whakatuwhera te paewhiri tohutoro hei kuhu i ngā tohu i te wā e tuhi ana koe.

theme.title: Tāhuhu
theme.body: Mārama, pōuri, me ngā momo paratau teitei — tīpakohia tētahi e tika ana mō ō karu.

editor.title: Te ētita
editor.body: He ētita kupu hua-rua ki ngā pātuhi tere Markdown, ngā poraka waehere me ngā tohutoro. Tīmata te patopato — kua tiakina aunoa tō mahi i te rohe.

citations.title: Ngā tohutoro
citations.description: Te whakahaere o ngā tohu me ngā rārangi pukapuka.

intro.title: Tō rārangi pukapuka
intro.body: Kei konei e noho ana ngā tohu katoa o tētahi wāhi. Kawemai he kōnae BibTeX, tāpirihia rānei ngā urunga ā-ringa.

add.title: Tāpiri, kawemai rānei
add.body: Whakaheke he kōnae .bib, whakapiri rānei he kupu BibTeX. Ka peke aunoa ngā tāruatanga.

list.title: Te rārangi
list.body: Rapua, tātarihia, whakatikatika ngā tohutoro inline. Mai i konei ka taea hoki te kawe atu i te rārangi pukapuka katoa.

intro.title: Whakaaro nui
intro.body: Ko BrainSpace he papa kanapa koreutu mō ngā whakaaro — tukua ngā tuhipoka, hononga rātou, ka hangaia tō whakaaro i mua i te neke ki te kōrero.

addNote.title: Tāpiri tuhipoka
addNote.body: Whakaheke he tuhipoka o tētahi momo ki te papa kanapa. Tōhia ki te neke, panonihia te rahi mai i ngā kokonga.

canvas.title: Te papa kanapa
canvas.body: Shift+pātuhi i ngā tuhipoka e rua hei hono. Pātuhia te papamuri hei whakakore i te whiringa.
